languages.text: "Умолкни! Лишь ты повинен в случившемся! Твой призыв вывел их из стазиса!" {n}В порыве эмоций техножрец забывается, срывая с аугментированной головы черный колпак. Лицо Эоганна почти до неузнаваемости искажено гримасой душевных страданий.{/n}

"Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Умолкни! Лишь ты повинен в случившемся! Твой призыв вывел их из стазиса!" {n}В порыве эмоций техножрец забывается, срывая с аугментированной головы черный колпак. Лицо Эоганна почти до неузнаваемости искажено гримасой душевных страданий.{/n}

Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

"Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the crimson hood from his augmented head. Eo-gann's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

"Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the crimson hood from his augmented head. Eo-gann's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

"Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

"Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

languages.text: “住口！你才是一切的始作俑者！是你的呼唤将它们从静滞中唤醒！”{n}情绪失控之下，技术神甫一时失态，一把扯下覆盖在植入物头颅上的黑色罩帽。伊奥贡的脸因内心煎熬而扭曲得几乎变形。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “住口！你才是一切的始作俑者！是你的呼唤将它们从静滞中唤醒！”{n}情绪失控之下，技术神甫一时失态，一把扯下覆盖在植入物头颅上的黑色罩帽。伊奥贡的脸因内心煎熬而扭曲得几乎变形。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Cállate! ¡Todo fue culpa tuya! ¡Tu llamada les sacó de la suspensión!». {n}En un arrebato, el tecnosacerdote deja atrás toda compostura y se arranca la gorra negra de su cabeza aumentada. La cara de Eogunn está irreconocible, distorsionada con una mueca atormentada.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Cállate! ¡Todo fue culpa tuya! ¡Tu llamada les sacó de la suspensión!». {n}En un arrebato, el tecnosacerdote deja atrás toda compostura y se arranca la gorra negra de su cabeza aumentada. La cara de Eogunn está irreconocible, distorsionada con una mueca atormentada.{/n}

languages.text: « Silence ! C'est votre faute, vous êtes responsable de ce qui s'est passé ! C'est votre appel qui les a tirés de la stase ! » {n}Dans un élan d'émotion, le technoprêtre s'oublie et arrache le couvre-chef sombre qui recouvrait jusqu'alors sa tête augmentée. Le visage d'Eogunn est difforme, presque méconnaissable, les traits tordus par le tourment.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Silence ! C'est votre faute, vous êtes responsable de ce qui s'est passé ! C'est votre appel qui les a tirés de la stase ! » {n}Dans un élan d'émotion, le technoprêtre s'oublie et arrache le couvre-chef sombre qui recouvrait jusqu'alors sa tête augmentée. Le visage d'Eogunn est difforme, presque méconnaissable, les traits tordus par le tourment.{/n}

languages.text: "Kapa çeneni! Olanların sorumlusu sensin! Çağrın onları stazdan çıkardı!" {n}Tekno Rahip, duygu patlamasıyla kendini kaybederek siyah başlığını ogmentli kafasından çekip alıyor. Eogunn'un yüzü, zihinsel ıstırabın yarattığı ifadeyle tanınmayacak şekilde çarpılmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kapa çeneni! Olanların sorumlusu sensin! Çağrın onları stazdan çıkardı!" {n}Tekno Rahip, duygu patlamasıyla kendini kaybederek siyah başlığını ogmentli kafasından çekip alıyor. Eogunn'un yüzü, zihinsel ıstırabın yarattığı ifadeyle tanınmayacak şekilde çarpılmış.{/n}

languages.text: "Haltet den Mund! Ihr seid für alles, was passiert ist, verantwortlich! Euer Ruf hat sie aus ihrer Stase geholt!" {n}Der Techpriester fällt angesichts seines Gefühlsausbruchs aus seiner Rolle und reißt sich die schwarze Kappe von seinem augmentierten Kopf. Eogunns Gesicht ist bis zur Unkenntlichkeit entstellt und zu einer Grimasse verzogen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the black cap from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Haltet den Mund! Ihr seid für alles, was passiert ist, verantwortlich! Euer Ruf hat sie aus ihrer Stase geholt!" {n}Der Techpriester fällt angesichts seines Gefühlsausbruchs aus seiner Rolle und reißt sich die schwarze Kappe von seinem augmentierten Kopf. Eogunns Gesicht ist bis zur Unkenntlichkeit entstellt und zu einer Grimasse verzogen.{/n}

languages.text: 「黙れ！お前が起きた原因だ！お前が電話したから、彼らが活動し始めたんだ！」{n}感情の昂りから、テクプリストは自らの制御を失い、赤いフードを頭から引き裂いた。エオガンの顔は、精神的な苦痛から歪み、ほとんど認識できないほどに変化していた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Shut up! You're the one responsible for what happened! Your call brought them out of stasis!" {n}In a rush of emotion, the Tech-Priest forgets himself, tearing the crimson hood from his augmented head. Eogunn's face is distorted almost beyond recognition in a grimace of mental anguish.{/n}
